detail.description:
🌈 Color by number to relax your mind with Pixel Art, one of the first and largest coloring games on the Google Play! Join millions of happy players and find your zen through the paint by number game from a top developer. ⭐️

👨‍🎨 Designed by gaming experts and loved by players worldwide, Pixel Art offers a meditative coloring journey. Explore over 40,000 artworks or create your own pixel masterpieces. Paint by number and get the soothing experience of Pixel Art coloring games. 🎨

Why play Pix
detail.recentChanges:
- Performance and stability improvements

We read all your reviews and always try to make the game better. Please leave us some feedback if you love what we do and feel free to suggest any improvements. Color. Relax. Enjoy!
